message:
fix(worktrees): harden input validation and fix git command lifecycle

Input validation:
- Add validateWorktreeComponent() that rejects empty, absolute, ".",
  "..", and path-separator-containing agent/session names, preventing
  path traversal attacks and confusing git worktree paths
- Centralize path and branch construction in buildWorktreeInfo()
  so all methods (Create, List, MergeBack, Remove, Get, Cleanup)
  share validated, consistent paths

Git command helpers:
- Replace gitCmd() (which leaked context cancels and required manual
  Dir assignment) with gitCombinedOutput(), gitRun(), and gitOutput()
  that accept a dir parameter and properly defer cancel()
- Add worktreeListed() for exact filepath.Clean matching against
  porcelain output instead of substring Contains, which could
  false-positive on prefix-overlapping paths

All methods updated to use the new helpers. Tests cover validation
rejections and the worktreeListed matcher.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
